message:
chore: update gitignore and minor indexer/test changes

Add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore:
- session_export_test.html: Test export artifact
- SQLite WAL/SHM files in demo data fixtures

Also includes concurrent agent changes to indexer and tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+tests/fixtures/search_demo_data/*.db-wal
